trend_text:

    NEW  Seoul → Seattle  $727.0/pp ($1999 fam)

    GONE Bangkok → San Francisco  was $651.0/pp
    GONE Seoul → Washington, D.C.  was $716.0/pp
    GONE Seoul → Baltimore  was $716.0/pp
